message:
feat(conformance): add 11 tensor operation fixture suites and report types

Expand the conformance test harness with comprehensive fixture-driven
tests covering a wide range of tensor operations. Each suite includes
JSON test cases with contract IDs and e2e scenario tags, plus
corresponding report structs and runner logic in lib.rs.

New fixture categories:
- tensor_unary_cases: abs, neg, exp, log, sqrt, sin, cos, tanh, sigmoid, relu (with gradient checks)
- tensor_comparison_cases: equal, not_equal, allclose (with rtol/atol/equal_nan options)
- tensor_searchsorted_cases: sorted-sequence binary search with left/right modes
- tensor_factory_cases: zeros, ones, full, arange, linspace, logspace, eye
- tensor_einsum_cases: Einstein summation with multi-input equations (transpose, matmul, trace, batch matmul)
- tensor_reduction_cases: sum, mean, max, min, prod with optional dim and gradient validation
- tensor_loss_cases: mse_loss, l1_loss, smooth_l1_loss, huber_loss (with beta/delta params)
- tensor_linalg_cases: matmul, dot, norm, det (single-input and dual-input variants)
- tensor_normalize_cases: batch_norm, layer_norm, l2_normalize with dimensional params
- tensor_elementwise_cmp_cases: gt, lt, ge, le, eq, ne element-wise comparisons
- tensor_shape_cases: reshape, transpose, permute, squeeze, unsqueeze, flatten, expand, cat, stack, split, chunk

Also refactors the lib.rs fixture/report infrastructure, replacing the
old TensorMeta, Dispatch, Scheduler, and Serialization fixture structs
with the new operation-specific types and updating smoke.rs tests to
validate fixture deserialization for all new suites.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "cases": [
+    {
+      "name": "equal_identical_tensors",
+      "op": "equal",
+      "lhs": [1.0, 2.0, 3.0],
+      "rhs": [1.0, 2.0, 3.0],
+      "shape": [3],
+      "expected": true,
+      "contract_ids": ["CPU-KERNEL-CMP-001"],
+      "e2e_scenarios": ["cpu_kernel:tensor_comparison"]
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "equal_different_values",
+      "op": "equal",
+      "lhs": [1.0, 2.0, 3.0],
+      "rhs": [1.0, 2.0, 4.0],
+      "shape": [3],
+      "expected": false,
+      "contract_ids": ["CPU-KERNEL-CMP-002"],
+      "e2e_scenarios": ["cpu_kernel:tensor_comparison"]
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "equal_2d_identical",
+      "op": "equal",
+      "lhs": [1.0, 2.0, 3.0, 4.0],
+      "rhs": [1.0, 2.0, 3.0, 4.0],
+      "shape": [2, 2],
+      "expected": true,
+      "contract_ids": ["CPU-KERNEL-CMP-003"],
+      "e2e_scenarios": ["cpu_kernel:tensor_comparison"]
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "allclose_within_tolerance",
+      "op": "allclose",
+      "lhs": [1.0, 2.0, 3.0],
+      "rhs": [1.0000001, 2.0000001, 3.0000001],
+      "shape": [3],
+      "rtol": 1e-5,
+      "atol": 1e-8,
+      "equal_nan": false,
+      "expected": true,
+      "contract_ids": ["CPU-KERNEL-CMP-004"],
+      "e2e_scenarios": ["cpu_kernel:tensor_comparison"]
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "allclose_outside_tolerance",
+      "op": "allclose",
+      "lhs": [1.0, 2.0, 3.0],
+      "rhs": [1.1, 2.0, 3.0],
+      "shape": [3],
+      "rtol": 1e-5,
+      "atol": 1e-8,
+      "equal_nan": false,
+      "expected": false,
+      "contract_ids": ["CPU-KERNEL-CMP-005"],
+      "e2e_scenarios": ["cpu_kernel:tensor_comparison"]
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "allclose_exact_match",
+      "op": "allclose",
+      "lhs": [0.0, -1.5, 2.5],
+      "rhs": [0.0, -1.5, 2.5],
+      "shape": [3],
+      "rtol": 0.0,
+      "atol": 0.0,
+      "equal_nan": false,
+      "expected": true,
+      "contract_ids": ["CPU-KERNEL-CMP-006"],
+      "e2e_scenarios": ["cpu_kernel:tensor_comparison"]
+    }
+  ]
+}
